jokes: Why did the scarecrow win an award? Because he was outstanding in his field!
I told my wife she was drawing her eyebrows too high. She looked surprised.
Why don't scientists trust atoms? Because they make up everything!
What's the difference between a tire and 365 used condoms? One's a Goodyear, the other's a great year.
Marriage is like a deck of cards. In the beginning, all you need is two hearts and a diamond. By the end, you're looking for a club and a spade.
Why did the coffee file a police report? It got mugged.
What do you call fake spaghetti? An impasta.
Ladka: Tumhari saheliyan kaisi hain? Ladki: Bohot achhi, par tumhari girlfriend kaisi hai?
Teacher: Beta, tumhari mummy papa kya karte hain? Beta: Mummy papa banati hain, main kha leta hoon.
Why did the bicycle fall over? It was two-tired.
What's long and hard that a Polish bride gets on her wedding night? A new last name.
I asked my dog what's two minus two. He said nothing.
Why did the math book look sad? Because it had too many problems.
Kya aapke paas WiFi hai? Kyun? Main toh connect karna chahta hoon.
Doctor: Tumhari wife pregnant hai. Husband: Kaise pata? Doctor: Maine check kiya.
Why can't you give Elsa a balloon? Because she will let it go.
What's the best thing about Switzerland? I don't know, but the flag is a big plus.
Ladki: Tum mere boyfriend banoge? Ladka: Nahi, main toh single rehna chahta hoon.
Why did the golfer bring two pairs of pants? In case he got a hole in one.
What's the difference between a hooker and a drug dealer? A hooker can wash her crack and resell it.
Why don't eggs tell jokes? They'd crack each other up.
I'm reading a book about anti-gravity. It's impossible to put down.
Did you hear about the mathematician who's afraid of negative numbers? He'll stop at nothing to avoid them.
Why did the couple go to the bank? To get their relationship in balance!
What did one wall say to the other wall? I'll meet you at the corner!
Kya tum mujhe pyaar karte ho? Tum se zyada sirf apne aap ko!
Why is a sleeping bull called a dozer? Because it's a bull-dozer!
I used to hate facial hair, but then it grew on me.
What's orange and sounds like a parrot? A carrot!
My wife told me to take the spider out instead of killing it. We went and had some drinks. Cool guy. Wants to be a web developer.
I'm on a seafood diet. I see food and I eat it.
What did the ocean say to the beach? Nothing, it just waved!
Why don't scientists trust atoms? They make up everything... literally!
I told my computer I needed a break, and now it won't stop sending me Kit-Kat ads.
What do you call a boomerang that doesn't come back? A stick.
My wife is on a tropical fruit diet. She eats nothing but bananas. She isn't getting any thinner, but when she goes to the zoo, the monkeys go crazy.
Why did the invisible man turn down the job? He couldn't see himself doing it.
Ladki apne boyfriend ko: Tu toh mere liye brahmaand hai! Boyfriend: Haan, aur tum mere universe ka sabse bada Black hole ho!
What's the difference between being hungry and being horny? Where you put the cucumber.
Why did the couple bring a ladder to the bar? Because they heard the drinks were on the house!
I told my wife she deserves a day off. She said, 'Finally!' Three days later, she's still not back.
What do you call a married couple who can't keep their hands off each other? A power couple... of horny idiots.
Why don't skeletons fight each other? They don't have the guts.
Husband: Sab log bolte hain marriage se pehle prem, marriage ke baad pair! Wife: Isme time nahi laga, marriage ke pehle hi pair lag gaye!
What's the difference between a wife and a girlfriend? About 45 pounds and 10 years!
Why did the couple go to space? To explore their relationship on another level!
actionCards: You're a pirate, and your map shows where the buried treasure is. It's in your Target's pants.
You're a hummingbird. Flap your little wings and go sip some nectar out of the juiciest flower (your Target).
Ask the Target which of the following is their favorite cereal/drug combination: 1. Kashi and ketamine 2. Muesli and meth 3. Apple Jacks and smokin' crack 4. Corn Flakes and bath salts 5. CTC and PCP
Stare into each other's eyes without blinking for 30 seconds. Longest one wins!
Kiss your partner's forehead and whisper something you love about them.
Do a funny dance together for 15 seconds. Most ridiculous wins!
Tell your partner the most embarrassing thing that happened to you. Bonus drink if they laugh!
Do your best impression of your partner. If they laugh, you both drink!
Feed your partner a snack with your eyes closed.
Text your partner the most cheesy pickup line you can. If they respond positively, celebrate!
Do 10 push-ups or sit-ups together. Count for each other!
Sing a love song to your partner (even if badly). Passion points!
Tell a funny story about how you two met. Loser buys next round!
Do a silly pose together and take a selfie.
Arm wrestle or play rock-paper-scissors. Loser drinks!
Recreate your first kiss. Or improves on it!
Trade articles of clothing for 5 minutes.
Make up a funny couple name together and introduce yourselves with it.
Tie your hands together for 2 minutes while doing a task.
Take a shot together, look in each other's eyes, and don't laugh.
Do the Floss dance.
Handstand against the wall for as long as you can. Other person cheers!
Do a TikTok dance together (even if terribly).
Act like you are Cooking something blindfolded.
Tie a knot with your eyes closed.
Do your best celebrity impression for your partner.
Whisper something naughty to your partner. Their reaction decides if you both drink!
Make eye contact with your target and lick every inch of your lips.
You're a tickle me elmo. Insist that your target tickle you, and if they do, get furious at them.
Get emotional and tell your Target, 'I don't know how to say this, but I'm sexually attracted to you and I want to wear your skin'
You're a dolphin. Slap your fins together and try to find your target using echolocation.
Dance using only your hips.
Yell 'How dare you!?' at your target and then slap yourself.
Announce that this is NOT a part of the game. Get down on one knee and propose to your target. List everything you love about them.
In your best Obama voice, say to the target: 'I'm looking for a dime that's top of the line: cute face, slim waist, with a big behind.'
In a terrible singing voice, sing 'Hey There Delilah' but replace Delilah with your target's name.
Make a loud bird sound, fly over to your target, and start pecking them.
Show your target how to swing a golf club by standing right behind them and grabbing their hands.
You're a cowboy. Go find the most trusty steed you can (your target). Then mount up (piggyback) - we ride!
Leave the room, come back, look right at your target, sigh, and immediately leave again.
Ask your target to get on all fours. Pretend to milk them like a cow, explaining the process aloud and describing the quality of milk they're producing.
You're a sushi chef berating your target for using a fork in the restaurant.
Spin in circles yelling 'I'M A WASHING MACHINE!'
You're a chubby seal and your target just got too close to your seal pup. Bark at them to back off.
Try to do splits while screaming in agony and looking right at your target.
Have an emotional breakdown while doing some dad dance moves.
You're a buyer at a cattle auction, and your target is just about the most delightful steer you've ever seen.
You are a magnet. Your target is a big chunk of metal. Yell 'I'M A MAGNET' and hurtle towards your target.
Hold a squat while maintaining eye contact with your target.
Pretend you have to tell your target a secret, then suddenly blow in their ear.
Treat your target like a dog that wants to go for a walk.
Lightly touch parts of your target's body while whispering what each body part is.
While motioning to your target, say: 'Welcome to the Price is Right! The first is this little hag. Is the price over or under $3?'
You're a therapist, and your target's crotch is your deeply troubled patient.
Do an impersonation of yourself.
Do a PSA on why sex is bad and scary.
Your target is a turkey you're about to cook. Explain the proper cooking technique to your TV-show audience. You'll prepare the turkey by 'tying it up and bitch slapping it with some butter.'
You're Mickey Mouse going through withdrawals, and your target has the drugs you're looking for.
Lay on the floor underneath your target and say to the group: 'Hey, my name is Steve-O, and this is the nut wrangler.'
Talk sexy to your drink. Tell it you crave its condensation and thirst-quenching liquids.
Act as if you are about to perform a bris on your target.
Look at your target like they are a mirror and you're getting ready in the morning. Give yourself compliments: 'Wow, I look fucking good.' 'I would definitely have sex with myself.'
Ask the group to close their eyes, bow their heads and beg that your target might finally 'get that dick'.
Blow a line of coke off your target's crotch.
Do some gymnastic moves while yelling 'Look at me, Daddy!' to your target.
Mime giving a nice thorough hand job to your target. No speaking allowed (grunting is acceptable).
Writhe on the ground, yelling to your target: 'Please help me - I am but a humble fish!'
Tell your target you're going to give them a blow job, and then blow all over them.
You're a rabid dog. Bark, snarl, and chase your target around the room while drooling.
Announce that you're a motivational speaker and give your target an intense pep talk while doing squats.
Tell your target they have something on their face, then lick it off when they lean in.
Pretend you're a car alarm. Go off unpredictably and get increasingly louder whenever your target looks at you.
You're a vampire hunter. Dramatically search your target's neck for bite marks while making exaggerated gasps.
Yell 'SUBJECT ACQUIRED!' at your target, throw an imaginary net over them, and drag them around.
Do a workout routine but narrate it like you're training your target to be a champion fighter.
You're possessed. Speak in a demonic voice only to your target while your body convulses.
Treat your target's arm like it's a delicious turkey leg. Make eating sounds and pretend to nibble it.
You're a game show host. Spin your target around and ask them increasingly insulting questions.
Literally become a magnet - run at your target and 'stick' to them, unable to peel off.
You're a secret agent defusing a bomb. Your target is the bomb. Get very close, squint at them, and make beeping sounds.
Announce that your target owes you a life debt and must follow your every command for the next 2 minutes.
You're a fortune teller. Grab your target's face and give them a absurdly detailed 'prophecy' about their future.
Pretend you're a wildlife documentary narrator describing your target like they're a rare animal.
You're a broken robot. Move in jerky motions and repeat 'ERROR... TARGET... ERROR...' while pointing at them.
Tell your target you're a hugger and give them the most awkwardly long hug possible while humming.
You're a malfunctioning ATM. Spit out invisible money while making beeping sounds at your target.
